steps.title: Identify the text's movement
steps.content: The passage opens with a specific debut work, then immediately anchors it to a broader literary tradition (“decades-long tradition going back to...”), and concludes by explaining what that tradition represents.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content:
C is correct because it describes the passage's actual movement: introducing an intriguing debut work, contextualizing it within a literary tradition, and describing important themes of that tradition.

The other three misrepresent the passage by adding elements it never includes—political event analysis, uniqueness distinctions, or plot summary.

That confirms C is correct.
